title: cracca noctiflora
intro: Cracca noctiflora, also known as Wild Labrador Tea, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cracca noctiflora include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiviral properties, which help to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cracca noctiflora include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations.
